subcodes.first_line: Say: Verily the pathways have branched forth from this Most Mighty Path, and the ways have diverged from this Straight Way. Say: He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل ان السبل انشعبت من هذا السبیل القویم و الطرق من هذا الصراط المستقیم قل انه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as mediator, @Word of God is its own standard, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
